popularStory.headline: Thomas Dryer
popularStory.description: . Thomas Dyer 1 was born between 1612 and 1613 in Shepton Mallet, Somersetshire, England,2 died on 5 Nov 1676 in Boston, Suffolk, Mass,2 3 and was buried in 1676 in King's Chapel Burial Ground, Boston …

zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Dyer於1612年出生在英國薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特。他於1640年與Agnes Reed在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可維姆斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1644年住在美國麻薩諸塞州。他在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可維姆斯被列為farmer。他去世於1676年11月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓享年64歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓金斯 查阿培爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Dyer于1612年出生在英国薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特。他于1640年与Agnes Reed在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可維姆斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1644年住在美国马萨诸塞州。他在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可維姆斯被列为farmer。他去世于1676年11月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓享年64岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓金斯 查阿培爾。

nameMeanings.name: Dyer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer of cloth, from Middle English deier, degher ‘dyer’ (Old English dēag ‘dye’; the verb is a back-formation from the agent noun). Compare Dexter . The name is typical of southern England. In the Midlands Dexter is the more common equivalent and in northern England Lister .
Irish (Sligo and Antrim): variant of   Dwyer  .

variants.name: Dier
meanings: South German: from Middle High German dier ‘wild animal, game’; probably a metonymic occupational name for a hunter, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by a sign depicting such an animal.

variants.name: Dayer
meanings: English and Scottish: perhaps a variant of   Dyer  .

variants.name: Dyar
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Dyer  .

variants.name: Dexter
meanings: English (East Midlands): occupational name from Middle English dexter(e), dei(gh)ester, deyster ‘dyer’ (Old English deaʒestre, deʒ(e)stre). The word originally denoted a female dyer, but came to be used for dyers of both sexes. Compare Dyer .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Dyer was born in 1612, in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England. He married Agnes Reed in 1640, in Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Massachusetts, United States in 1644. His occupation is listed as farmer in Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 5 November 1676, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 64, and was buried in Kings Chapel, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas Dyer est né en 1612, à Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre. Il a épousé Agnes Reed en 1640, à Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1644. Sa profession de son indiquée est farmer à Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 5 novembre 1676, à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Kings Chapel, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Thomas Dyer wurde 1612 in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England geboren. Er hat 1640 in Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Agnes Reed geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1644 hat er in Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. sein Beruf ist als farmer in Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb am 5. November 1676 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Kings Chapel, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Thomas Dyer è nato il nel 1612 nel Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England. Lui sposato Agnes Reed nel 1640, nel Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1644. La sua occupazione è indicata come farmer nel Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Morì il 5 novembre 1676, nel Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Kings Chapel, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーフォルク
ja.Weymouth, Massachusetts: アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ノーフォルクウエイモウス

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Dyerは1612年にイギリスソメルセトシェプトン マレットで生まれた。1640年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクウエイモウスでAgnes Reedと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1644年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州に住んでいた。イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクウエイモウスでの職業はfarmerと記録されている。彼は1676年11月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンで64歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンキングズ チャペルにて埋葬された。

ko.Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 w이모우스
ko.Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴
ko.Kings Chapel, Boston, Suffolk, Massachus: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 킨그스 차플
ko.Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Dyer(은)는 1612년 영국 서머세트 셰프턴 맬렛에서 태어났다. 그는 1640년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 w이모우스에서 Agnes Reed(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1644년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주에서 살았다. 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 w이모우스에서 farmer이었다. 그는 1676년 11월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 킨그스 차플에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas Dyer nasceu em 1612, em Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Agnes Reed em 1640, em Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1644. Sua profissão aparece como farmer em Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 5 de novembro de 1676, em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Kings Chapel, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Dyer родился в 1612 г. в местности шептон маллет, сомирсет, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Reed в 1640 г. в местности вимоут, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1644 году.  Он работал по профессии farmer в местности вимоут, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 5 ноября 1676 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности кингс чапел, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Thomas Dyer nació en 1612, en Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra. Se casó con Agnes Reed en 1640, en Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1644. Su ocupación registrada era farmer en Weymouth, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Murió el 5 de noviembre de 1676, en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Kings Chapel, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
